title: Oil and water. Hidden stakes of the war in Iran | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Here's why oil and water disruptions in the Middle East affect energy, fertilizer and food prices here at home.

title: Barron Trump complimented by Japan's prime minister
shortDescription: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi praised Barron Trump during a White House dinner ahead of his birthday.

title: Oil and water: Hidden stakes of the war in Iran
shortDescription: Here's why oil and water disruptions in the Middle East affect energy, fertilizer and food prices here at home.

title: Barron Trump turns 20 on the 20th. What to know about the first son
shortDescription: How tall is Barron Trump? Standing at least 6-foot-7, Donald and Melania's son has largely stayed out of the public eye during his father's presidency

title: 65% of Americans believe Trump will send troops to Iran, poll finds
shortDescription: The Reuters/Ipsos poll, released on March 19, also found that nearly 60% of Americans disapprove of the war.

title: Barron Trump called 'good-looking gentleman' by Japan's prime minister
shortDescription: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi said that President Donald Trump's son was "good looking" and that he got his looks from "his parents."

title: James Comey subpoenaed in probe of Obama officials and 2016 election
shortDescription: Ex-FBI chief James Comey was subpoenaed in a DOJ probe into Obama administration officials' investigation of 2016 Russian election interference.

title: Trump to move oversight of billions in student debt outside Ed Dept.
shortDescription: The Trump administration is attempting to move supervision of federal student loan debt to the Treasury Department from the Education Department.

title: Design approved for US Mint's 24k gold Trump coin, despite objections
shortDescription: The design would be for a gold commemorative coin. A separate $1 coin featuring President Donald Trump has attracted even more pushback.

title: Trump says US 'not putting troops anywhere'
shortDescription: President Trump denied the U.S. is sending troops to Iran, despite a U.S. Navy warship carrying 2,000 Marines being spotted moving into the region.

title: Trump makes Pearl Harbor joke to Japanese prime minister
shortDescription: Trump jokingly referred to the initial strikes on Iran to the attack on Pearl Harbor while seated next to Japan's Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi.

title: Trump compares Iran strikes to Pearl Harbor
shortDescription: President Donald Trump compared Iran strikes with Pearl Harbor in front of Japan's prime minister and Japanese reporters.

title: Trump's pick to lead DHS clears key hurdle with help of Democrat
shortDescription: A key Senate panel advanced Republican Sen. Markwayne Mullin's nomination to lead DHS, putting him on a glide path to confirmation.

title: FBI investigating former Trump official Joe Kent
shortDescription: Former counterterrorism director Joe Kent is under FBI investigation for reportedly leaking classified information. Sources said the investigation began before his resignation in protest of the war.

title: Trump urged Israel-Iran to exercise restraint
shortDescription: Israel bombed Iran’s massive Pars natural gas field, causing oil prices to jump and setting a new benchmark in the U.S.-Israeli war.

title: Trump religious liberty commissioner says Israel views got her fired
shortDescription: Carrie Prejean Boller said she was removed from the Religious Liberty Commission because she did not reflect the administration's positions on Israel.

title: What is Donald Trump's approval rating? See latest polls
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has long been a polarizing figure, with the vast majority of Democrats disapproving of his job peformance. How many approve?
